raw_consumer_statement: I had an XXXX XXXX Credit card with XXXX XXXX, and the APR was about 24 %. So by XX/XX/year>. I received a noticed from the XXXX XXXX Credit card stating that they are going to increase my APR around 30 % due to market regulation. Then they said that if I do not accept the increase they will close my account. Then If I do not deny, the increase will be automatic. So by XX/XX/year> I reach out to them to tell them that I will not accept the new APR. then they said to me, that they will close out the account and I will be able to get this account back, and I agreed. So they closed the account, but I received a statement later on after the account was closed that I still had to pay off a debt of {$15.00}, XXXX. XXXX for a transaction that was made onto my credit card on XX/XX/year> that I did not really aware of. So I tried to logging onto my credit card account to dispute that charge multiple times, and it has never been successful. I tried to reach out to the company, and it did not get successful either. As of now I am still making payment for that debt, despite the account is closed.
